citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
Female Eskimo (microchip # 932002000583, DOB 01-14-19) has poor dental health. Nearly the entire surface of the
upper right and left cheek teeth are encased in a yellow-grey colored organic material. At least 3/4ths of the surface of the
upper right and left canine teeth are covered in the material and a thin build up of the material is located on the surface of
the upper front teeth. Poor dental health could cause pain and discomfort to the dog as well as lead to further health
issues.
Each dealer shall use appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases and injuries. This dog must
be evaluated by a veterinarian for an accurate diagnosis and to develop an effective treatment plan. The licensee must
ensure each dog receives adequate veterinary care at all times.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
Additional Inspectors:
Emily Steele, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2)  Repeat
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
Female Eskimo (microchip # 932002000583, DOB 01-14-19) has poor dental health. Nearly the entire surface of the 
upper right and left cheek teeth are encased in a yellow-grey colored organic material. At least 3/4ths of the surface of the 
upper right and left canine teeth are covered in the material and a thin build up of the material is located on the surface of 
the upper front teeth. Poor dental health could cause pain and discomfort to the dog as well as lead to further health 
issues. 
 
Each dealer shall use appropriate methods to prevent, control, diagnose, and treat diseases and injuries. This dog must 
be evaluated by a veterinarian for an accurate diagnosis and to develop an effective treatment plan. The licensee must 
ensure each dog receives adequate veterinary care at all times. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
